prompts.system: Build a reusable fictional Loop Lab workshop event-card SVG system.
prompts.user: Create standalone valid accessible 1200x630 card.svg with required title/date/time/venue/CTA. Visual language: distinctive modular loops / phase-shifted signal paths.

iterations.lesson: Phase-shifted signal paths that span the entire canvas can interfere heavily with text readability.
iterations.stop_reason: Failed overlap check, requires layout iteration.

prompts.system: Build a reusable fictional Loop Lab workshop event-card SVG system.
prompts.user: Shift the visual language elements to the right hemisphere of the card to avoid overlapping with text. Extend the system by adding a 'Track' module/badge.

iterations.lesson: Zoning text and visual elements into strict left/right hemispheres prevents overlap and creates a cleaner UI.
